_README: Deterministic client -> SAP SOLD-TO overrides for the chatbot's invoice lookup.
When a focused client matches one of the 'aliases' below, the invoice fetch is
scoped DIRECTLY to the listed sold-to number(s) and the fuzzy name->customer
matching is skipped entirely. Use this for clients whose folder name diverges
from their SAP name (e.g. folder 'YNB' vs SAP 'YUKON NATIONAL BANK', or 'ZELLCO
FEDERAL CREDIT UNION' vs SAP 'Zellco FCU') where fuzzy matching misses.
Matching: an alias matches if its normalized form (lowercase, alphanumeric only)
equals the focused client's normalized name, OR is contained in it (>=4 chars).
So 'Farm Credit of Southern Colorado' matches the folder 'Farm Credit Of Southern
Colorado 233209'. Add the exact Input/ folder name as an alias to be certain.
sold-to NUMBERS are authoritative (they don't change); names are just aliases.
Edit this file freely — it is reloaded automatically when its timestamp changes.
